2 ?07 0110110010 5

Constant
2 C 2 1111111111 a mismatch
2 C 2n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 0
2 I 0 0101110100 5 mismatch
2 I 0n 1010001011 5 mismatch

Unary 7
2 I 7 0011000110 4 mismatch
2 I 7n 1100111001 6 mismatch

Binary 07
2 AND 07 0001000100 2 mismatch
2 AND 07n 1110111011 8 mismatch
2 OR 07 0111110110 7 mismatch
2 OR 07n 1000001001 3 mismatch
2 XOR 07 0110110010 5 match 1/1
all match XOR 07
2 XOR 07n 1001001101 5 mismatch
2 AND-NOT 07 0100110000 3 mismatch
2 AND-NOT 07n 1011001111 7 mismatch
2 OR-NOT 07 1101111101 8 mismatch
2 OR-NOT 07n 0010000010 2 mismatch

0 I 5

Extending defaults
2 0110110010 5
Starting at I 6 increasing
I 7 0011000110 partial 1010001011 5
left 5
Starting at I 1 decreasing

right 6
Choosing right
2 I 0

Selected
0 I 5
1 I 6
2 XOR 07
3 I 1
4 I 2
5 I 3
6 I 4
7 I 5

Applying to 00010000
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 5 = 0
1 I 6 = 0
2 XOR 07 = XOR(I 0,I 7) = XOR(0,0) = 0
3 I 1 = 0
4 I 2 = 0
5 I 3 = 1
6 I 4 = 0
7 I 5 = 0

\boxed{00000100}
